build_system: Gradle 8.14+ with Kotlin 2.1.21, Compose 1.7.3. Root build.gradle.kts applies plugins. Single :composeApp module.
test_framework: kotlin.test in commonTest source set. Tests are plain @Test annotated classes.
verification_instructions: Run ./gradlew allTests to verify all tests pass. Run ./gradlew build to verify full compilation.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Compose Resources generates gaime.resources.Res class with typed accessors for files in composeResources/drawable/ and composeResources/files/. These are auto-generated during build and not checked in.
setup_instructions: JDK 17+ must be available. Gradle wrapper downloads Gradle 8.14.5 automatically.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. WAV files total ~212MB across all 3 voices. The .gitignore excludes common media formats (mp3, ogg, png, jpg) but NOT .wav. The extracted WAVs are currently in .extracted/ which should be added to .gitignore.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Game concept is locked in docs/GAME_CONCEPT_LOCK.md. BarkEvent enum must stay in sync with BARK_TRIGGER_TABLE.md. Every BarkEvent must have a BarkRegistry entry (enforced by init check).
key_patterns: BarkEvent enum -> BarkRegistry metadata -> BarkEventBus (cooldowns) -> SliceDirector (pipeline). ComposeResources: drawable/ for images accessed via Res.drawable.xxx. For raw files, composeResources/files/ directory generates Res.files accessors. Platform code: androidMain has MainActivity, desktopMain has main.kt. Audio playback requires platform-specific implementations (expect/actual pattern).
directory_structure: Root: GAIME/ with single module composeApp/. Source sets: commonMain (shared logic), androidMain (Android Activity), desktopMain (JVM window). Resources: composeApp/src/commonMain/composeResources/drawable/ for images. Tests: composeApp/src/commonTest/kotlin/. Archives: *.7z.part* files in root contain voice WAVs. Extracted to .extracted/{gruff,raspy,whiny}/{gruff,raspy,whiny}/*.wav.
